title: VANLIFE Website
description: Built with Firebase, featuring a functional database, a client login simulator with authentication and user dashboard panel.

title: GoRural Website
description: Designed and developed the GoRural web experience using React, translating a Figma prototype into a fully functional website.

title: Donuts App
description: Developed an interactive Donuts App. Using React and Redux to add, delete, create Donuts in a backend online database.

title: Chef Claude
description: A React app where users add ingredients to a list, and AI generates a complete recipe based on them.

title: Pokemon App
description: Build a multi-page Pokémon web application with detailed Pokémon information, using Next.js for the frontend and server-side functionality.

title: Assembly Engame
description: A classic Hangman game where players guess a hidden word by selecting letters. Each incorrect guess brings them closer to losing the game.

title: Budget App
description: A budgeting app that allows users to add and manage their income and expenses. The app calculates the balance and generates a overview of the budget.

title: Dashboard
description: A real-time dashboard displaying live data from APIs including Bitcoin, weather, location, and date. All updated dynamically.

title: Meme Generator
description: A React application that allows users to input text which is overlaid onto a randomly fetched image from an API. Includes testing with Vitest.

title: MemoryGame
description: An accessible React app where users select the number and type of cards. Emojis are fetched from an API, with a strong focus on accessibility.

title: Tenzies
description: A JavaScript dice game where players roll numbers randomly and click on them to hold their values until all numbers match.

title: Cards War
description: A card game that uses an external API to generate a random deck. The player and the computer draw cards and their values are added to their scores.

title: Blackjack Game
description: Developed an interactive Blackjack game with button-driven gameplay, implementing game logic and user interactions using JavaScript.

title: Films selector
description: Developed a film searcher page, with selectors, grid and list view and search input. Getting the data from a API.

title: Activity Booking App
description: Designed a mobile app prototype in Figma to simplify the process of discovering and reserving activities.

title: Movie Website
description: A website showcasing movie information, built with clean HTML and CSS for a smooth user experience.

title: Movie Data Page
description: A movie information page, built with clean HTML and CSS for a smooth user experience.

title: Booking Confirmation Email
description: Created a custom email template for client reservations, designed with HTML and CSS.
